description: Bacteriophage phi80 attP attachment site; 480 bp, source-verified 100% to AY048738.1. Recombination substrate for the phi80 tyrosine integrase.

references.title: Conditional-replication, integration, excision, and retrieval plasmid-host systems for gene structure-function studies of bacteria.

references.authors: St-Pierre F, Cui L, Priest DG, Endy D, Dodd IB, Shearwin KE
references.title: One-step cloning and chromosomal integration of DNA.

references.authors: Argos P, Landy A, Abremski K, Egan JB, Haggard-Ljungquist E, Hoess RH, Kahn ML, Kalionis B, Narayana SV, Pierson LS
references.title: The integrase family of site-specific recombinases: regional similarities and global diversity.

label: phi80_attP
note: Bacteriophage phi80 phage attachment site (attP). Identified as attP (NOT bacterial attB) — its source AY048738.1 is a CRIM integration plasmid (pAH162), which carries the phage attP. Detailed sub-feature annotation and functional_claims pending a re-run under the corrected attP identity.

provenance.sequence_source: AY048738.1 (CRIM plasmid pAH162, Haldimann & Wanner 2001), complement(361..840), 100% over 480 bp
